TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Kinanoka, title = Kinanoka, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Kinanoka} }

S.FORM: Kinanoka Itiniay i Changbin Cen no Taitung ko Kinanoka a niyaro', 93 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 249 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 99% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 246 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 1% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 3 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Amis 97%, roma 2%.
S.PHON: kinano~uka itiniaj i ¶ńßaŇčb~b~vin ¶…ôn no~u taito~u~uŇč ko~u kinano~uka a nijaro~u °, ** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u paro~u…¨~…ģ no~u …ĺo~uma °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u tam…¨~…ģaw. **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u jin ¶o~umin , po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, *** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, *% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u ro~uma a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, * ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u tam…¨~…ģaw no~u kasafina ¶a…¨~…ģan i, ko~u amis **%, ro~uma *%.
S.FORM: Kinanoka Itiniay i Changbin Cen no Taitung ko Kinanoka a niyaro', 93 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 249 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 99% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 246 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 1% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 3 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Amis 97%, roma 2%.
